name: Gunman
description: Engage in epic physics-based stickman duels! Aim, shoot, and eliminate enemies across 50 challenging levels. Collect diamonds, upgrade your arsenal with powerful fire and heavy weapons, and become the ultimate marksman in this addictive shooting adventure.
instructions: Mouse Click and drag back to aim and set power Release to fire your arrow Touch Tap and drag back to aim Lift your finger to fire Arsenal Click Tap icons in the bottom bar to switch weapons or activate magical shields during your turn
